steps.title: Set up the total weight constraint
steps.content:
The elevator carries:
  • The person: 170 pounds
  • The boxes: $21x + 62y$ pounds
Since 4,840 is the maximum capacity:
$$170 + 21x + 62y \leq 4,840$$

steps.title: Simplify and identify the inequality
steps.content:
Subtract 170 from both sides to isolate the box weight:
$$21x + 62y \leq 4,840 - 170$$
$$21x + 62y \leq 4,670$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
